title: Task model contract
description: Deterministic ground truth for one task, generated from the .ecore metamodels. Maps runtime model names to metamodel URIs, prefixes, .ecore files and the set of types that exist. GENERATED — must not be hand-edited and must never be overridden by whatever the LLM guessed in semantic_cases.json. Defines structural admissibility only; the reference transformation remains the behavioural oracle.

source_hash.description: Hash of the source .ecore metamodels this snapshot was derived from; verified in CI.
